subject: [PATCH 7/8] mm: percpu: per-node kmem accounting using local credit

2026-05-11.patch_summary: This patch introduces per-node kmem accounting using a local credit system to handle precharged pages in the percpu memory allocation code. The previous approach used obj_stock, which is no longer suitable due to decoupling of memcg charging and kmem accounting. The new approach ensures that enough charged pages are available for allocation by maintaining a node-specific credit that gets refilled into the stock when necessary.
